positive: A whimsical, highly detailed geometric pattern featuring abstracted woodland creatures and celestial elements. The scene should show stylized, minimalist deer antlers intertwining with crescent moons and constellations formed by glowing geometric lines. Include playful, outlined badgers, stylized owls perched on geometrically patterned branches, and floating, abstract flora. The style must be sophisticated low-poly illustration mixed with retro-futuristic mandalas, rendered with strong black linework and vibrant jewel-toned pops of color (deep emerald green, sapphire blue, amethyst purple, and gold leaf accents). Center composition, clean silhouette against a solid, muted background, perfect for screen printing on apparel. High contrast, vector art quality, seamless repeat potential.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifact, grain, text, watermark, signature, dirty, messy, noisy, amateur drawing, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cartoonish, 3d render, photo, grayscale
